loginCode.subject: Your verification code
loginCode.title: Your verification code
loginCode.intro: To verify you identity, enter the following code:
loginCode.validityTime: This code will only be valid for the next {{expiration}} minutes.
loginCode.ignoreHelper: If you didn't try to sign in, you can safely ignore this email.
